subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Thy letter hath reached Our presence and We have perused it through Our grace, and We respond unto thee through this mighty Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی قد حضر کتابک و قرئناه بفضل من عندنا و اجبناک بهذا اللوح المنیع ان
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
